# Custom 404 Page

MarkBind initializes a default `404.md` in project root. You can customize this file to control the generated `404.html` page.

## Typical Setup

```html
<frontmatter>
  title: "Page Not Found"
  layout: 404.md
</frontmatter>

# Page Not Found

The page you are looking for does not exist.
```

Generated output is placed at `_site/404.html`.

## User Guide Source

- <https://markbind.org/userGuide/redirectingToACustom404Page.html>
